title: Working With Us
subtitle: We collaborate with firms, contractors, and institutions across Bangladesh and internationally. If you are interested in a partnership or associate arrangement, get in touch.

types.title: Associate Firms
types.description: We work with architectural and MEP firms that need structural or BIM engineering support — as a sub-consultant or a named partner on joint submissions.

types.title: Academic & Research Institutions
types.description: We engage with engineering faculties and research groups on applied structural and geotechnical challenges, grounded in BUET's engineering tradition.

types.title: International Clients & Firms
types.description: Our code range (BNBC, ASCE, ACI, Eurocode, ISO 19650) makes us a capable sub-consultant for international projects requiring a Bangladesh-based engineering team.
